search.resultsSubtitle: Use filters and sorting to quickly decide which record is the right one.
search.pageSubtitle: Search by company, product, category, model, or certificate number — then judge each record before opening the full detail page.
search.systemNoteBody: This stage focuses on trustworthy record lookup, document preview, and core certificate visibility.

cert.previewSectionSubtitle: Review the scanned certificate pages and open the original document.

hero.title: Search certificates before you open them
hero.subtitle: Built for fast lookup: confirm whether a company, product, model, or certificate number exists, whether it is still valid, and whether it is ready to view.

preview.title: Recently reviewed records
preview.subtitle: Open a verified record directly and inspect the structured fields before downloading the document.

browse.title: Start with company, category, or country
browse.subtitle: For many users, the first known clue is not the certificate number — it is the supplier, the product family, or the filing country.
browse.companiesSubtitle: Jump into known manufacturers and compare active records.
browse.categoriesSubtitle: Move from broad certificate groupings into precise product lookup.
browse.regionsSubtitle: Filter filings by origin or importer location.

recent.title: Use the list to judge before clicking into details
recent.subtitle: See company, product, model, status, and expiry in one pass so you can quickly decide which record matters.

workflow.title: A simple certificate-query MVP
workflow.subtitle: This first version focuses on reliable search, understandable result rows, and a detail page that exposes the document and core certificate fields clearly.
workflow.searchDescription: Start from the company, product, category, model, or certificate number you already know.
workflow.previewDescription: Check status, expiry, certificate number, and review state before opening the full record.
workflow.openDescription: Review the certificate details, file preview, and structured metadata in one place.

cta.title: Use the archive like a working system, not a brochure
cta.subtitle: The current MVP focuses on search, result clarity, and certificate visibility — the exact pieces users need first.
cta.noteBody1: Because the first goal is trustworthy certificate lookup, not marketing presentation.
cta.noteBody2: Once the query flow is right, the next stage can add admin management, company maintenance, and database-backed records.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: This User Agreement sets out the terms on which EU-DOC offers you access to and use of our Services. You agree to comply with all of the terms when accessing or using our Services.

about.title: 2. About EU-DOC
about.content: EU-DOC is a platform that allows users to upload and browse Declaration of Conformity for certified types, and provides shareable URL links for each certificate.

services.title: 3. Our Services
services.content: Our mission is to provide a comprehensive certificate library where users can upload, search, and share Declarations of Conformity for certified products.

usage.title: 4. Using EU-DOC
usage.content: By agreeing to this user agreement, you will follow these rules: Don't do anything illegal; Don't engage in harmful activities; Don't send spam; Don't share inappropriate content; Don't engage in fraudulent activities.

privacy.title: 5. Privacy
privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. We collect and use your data as described in our Privacy Statement. You own your information and can delete it at any time.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to provide and improve our services. Cookies enable us to understand your usage patterns and provide a better experience.
